title: helichrysum asperum
intro: Helichrysum asperum, also known as the rough paper helichrysum, is a flowering plant in the daisy family and is native to South Africa. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. Helichrysum asperum has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, such as arthritis, wounds, and digestive issues, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting digestive health. The herbal preparations of Helichrysum asperum include essential oils, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
